titleStmt.title: SII 9.164: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 164. (A.R. No. 42 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE KUMARASVAMI TEMPLE AT KUDATINI, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 23, Bahudhānya, Mārgaśira, ba. 7, Bṛihaspativāra corresponding to A.D. 1098 November 18 Thursday and refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva ruling from Kalyāna. The Mahāpradhāna Daṇḍanāyaka Sōmēśvarabhaṭṭōpādhāya and the Daṇḍanāyaka Mahāvishṇuvarasa, noted for their firm resolution and bravey, Viśvarūpa-Brahmachārin, all Dēśikajanas and the five Vargas of Koṭṭitoṇe made an agreement that Sāvimōja, son of Eraṇiga-Mādōja, and Chikka-Mādōja, son of Bēchōja, who convert Lokki gold coins into peacock-coins should give peacock-coins of the same weight as Lokki coins and (that in consideration of the profit) they should pay 12 gadyāṇas to the temple of the god Svāmidēva. Mahāvishṇuvarasa is also said to have made a gift of some tollrevenue for the service of the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīrjjayaścābhyudayaśca . jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvā
rāhaṁ kṣōbhitārnnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi
vṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttaṁ rājadhāni kalyāṇapu
rada nelevīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire
svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānajapasamā
dhisīḷaguṇasaṁpannarvviditavēdārtthatatvarabhinaveśākhallyarigvēdaratnāka
raraṣṭādaśadharmaśāstrakuśalarāśritajanakalpavrikṣarbbaṁdhujanādhā
rarśśiṣṭēṣṭavibdhajanānaṁdasaṁdōharmmaunagōtrapavitrarvvēdamitrarddī
nānāthānukaṁpāpararabhimānamērugaḷēkavākyaracalitadhai
ryyarśśaucāṁjanēyarmmanumārggacaritarppa(ṁ)ṇḍitapārijātarnnāmādisa
mastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvarārādhyarappa
śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīmadayyaṁgaḷu sōmēśvara
bhaṭṭōpādhyāyarumavara maiydunaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ mahāviṣṇupara
saruṁ svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda bratajapaniyamahōmasaṁ
yukta śrīsvāmikārttikēyadēvatapōvanādhipatigaḷappa daṇḍāsanī
viśvarūpabrahmacārigaḷuṁ svastyanēkayugavarttamānamahimāspadapra
siddhaśuddhānvayarssamastadēsikajanādhāraruṁ śrīsvāmikārttikēyapā
dapadmōpajīvigaḷappa śrīmatkoṭitoṇeya sthānadeyduvarggamumiṟdu
svasti śrīmaccāḷukyuvikramakālada 23 neya bahudhānyasaṁ
vatsarada mārgasira bahuḷa 7 brihaspativāradaṁdu Eraṇiga mā
dōjana magaṁ sāvimōjanuṁ bēcōjana magaṁ cikkamādōjanuṁ
śrīsvāmidēvara navilaccina ponnaṁ lokkiya ponnāṇiyu(ṁ)māponna
tūkamumāgi poydu salisuvaru śrīsvāmidēvargge varṣanibandha
diṁ teṟuva gadyāṇa panneraḍu gaḷaṁtigeyalu puṭṭidāyadoḷage lokki
yu navilumāgi ponnavaṇa ci(ṁ)nna manāydu kaḷedu nindantappa cūrṇna
bhaṁgāramaṁ patteṁṭiniḷipisal koṭṭācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ sukhamuṇbaru
Intī maryyādeyanārorvvarttappade pratipāḷisidarappaḍe śrīsvāmi
dēvarekkōṭitīrttadaluṁ vāraṇāsikurukṣētradaluṁ sūryyagrahaṇa
dalu sahasrabrāhmaṇargge sahasrakapilegaḷaṁ dānaṁgeyda phaḷa . Īntī
maryyādeyanāvanorvvanaḷidanappaḍe yā tīrttaṁgaḷalā tithi
yalumanituṁ brāhmaṇarumananitu kapileyumaṁ svahastadiṁdaḷi
da mahāpātakanakku . yāvanorvvaṁ dāḷiviṭṭatanaṁ geydanappaḍe paṁ
di sattudu nāyi sattudu svāna gārddhapacāṇḍāḷaru jātiguṁ vṛttigaṁ bahi .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi ḥ . sāsanamaṁ baradaṁ hiṇḍiya sāvimayyaṁ
gaḷamagaṁ duggimayyaṁ . svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīma
daccupannāyadadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ śrīmaddaṇḍanāyakaṁ mahāviṣṇuvarasa
ru śrīsvāmidēvaraṁgabhōgakke koṭṭittaṇeyalirddu pannāyada suṁkamaṁ
nōrppavaruṁ tiṁgaḷgeraḍu gadyāṇa ponna(ṁ)nilli māṟida staḷavikraya mo
dalāgi yalliyādoḍoṁdaṁ koḍuvudu Īntī dharmmamaṁ staḷada hannavaṇigaruṁ kaḍḍā
yada kōlkāṟaruṁ purassaharāgi naḍasuvudu . Ī dharmmamanaḷidaṁ paṁcamahā
pātaka . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.164 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
